nodes.name: index.js
nodes.summary: Entry point for the ECC SQLite-backed state store: resolves the database path, wraps sql.js with a transaction-safe API, opens the database, applies migrations, and builds the full query API via createStateStore.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses sql.js (WebAssembly SQLite) instead of better-sqlite3 to stay dependency-light; wrapSqlJsDatabase adds a custom transaction/exec layer on top.

nodes.name: migrations.js
nodes.summary: Manages SQLite schema migrations for the state store: tracks applied versions in a schema_migrations table and applies pending migrations in a single transaction.

nodes.name: queries.js
nodes.summary: Defines all SQL queries and the full data-access API for the state store, covering sessions, skill runs, work items, governance events, install state, and status aggregation across ECC entities.
nodes.languageNotes: createQueryApi (lines 382–899) is a large factory function that prepares all SQL statements at construction time for reuse.

nodes.name: schema.js
nodes.summary: Loads the ECC entity JSON schema and provides AJV-based validation helpers (validateEntity, assertValidEntity) used throughout queries.js to guard all write operations.

nodes.name: sessions-cli.js
nodes.summary: CLI tool for inspecting ECC session records: lists recent sessions, shows detailed session view with workers, skill runs, and decisions — outputs as JSON or human-readable text.

nodes.name: status.js
nodes.summary: CLI tool that queries the ECC state store for a system-wide status snapshot — active sessions, skill run health, install state, governance events, work items, and GitHub coordination — and renders the result as human-readable text, Markdown, or JSON.

nodes.name: work-items.js
nodes.summary: CLI tool for managing ECC work items: lists, gets, upserts, and closes items, and syncs GitHub PRs/issues from the gh CLI into the state store as work items.

nodes.name: state-store.test.js
nodes.summary: Comprehensive integration test suite for the state store library: exercises database initialization, migrations, session/skill/work-item/governance CRUD operations, status aggregation, and CLI script invocations.

nodes.name: github-coordination.test.js
nodes.summary: Integration tests for GitHub coordination work-item sync: uses a gh CLI shim to simulate GitHub API responses and verifies that work-items.js correctly upserts PR and issue work items into the state store.

nodes.name: wrapSqlJsDatabase
nodes.summary: Wraps a raw sql.js database instance with a higher-level API (exec, pragma, all, get, run, transaction, close) that automatically persists the in-memory database to disk after each mutating operation.

nodes.name: openDatabase
nodes.summary: Opens the SQLite database file from disk (or creates a new one), loads it into sql.js memory, and sets WAL mode and foreign key pragmas.

nodes.name: createStateStore
nodes.summary: Public factory that initializes the complete state store: resolves path, opens the database, applies pending migrations, and returns the full query API bundled with a close method.

nodes.name: resolveStateStorePath
nodes.summary: Resolves the SQLite database path from ECC_STATE_STORE_PATH env var, project-local .ecc-state.db, or a default under ~/.claude/ecc/state.db.

nodes.name: applyMigrations
nodes.summary: Determines which schema migrations have not yet been applied and executes them in order inside a single database transaction, recording each applied version in schema_migrations.

nodes.name: getAppliedMigrations
nodes.summary: Queries the schema_migrations table and returns all applied migration records ordered by version.

nodes.name: createQueryApi
nodes.summary: Factory that prepares all SQL statements once at initialization time and returns a complete data-access API object covering upsert/insert/get/list operations for sessions, skill runs, work items, skill versions, decisions, install state, and governance events.

nodes.name: summarizeSkillRuns
nodes.summary: Aggregates a list of skill run records into summary statistics including success/failure counts, rate percentages, and most recent runs.

nodes.name: summarizeInstallHealth
nodes.summary: Aggregates plugin installation records into a health summary with healthy/degraded/unknown counts and per-installation detail.

nodes.name: summarizeWorkItems
nodes.summary: Aggregates work item records into a summary with open/closed/attention/total counts for status reporting.

nodes.name: getEntityValidator
nodes.summary: Returns a cached AJV validator for the named entity type, compiling from the JSON schema on first access.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point for the sessions CLI: parses args, opens the state store, dispatches to list or detail view, and prints results as JSON or human-readable output.

nodes.name: parseArgs
nodes.summary: Parses CLI arguments for the sessions tool, extracting the subcommand (list, detail), session ID, limit, and output format flags.

nodes.name: renderMarkdown
nodes.summary: Renders the full ECC status payload as a structured Markdown document with sections for skill runs, install health, work items, GitHub coordination, and governance events.

nodes.name: summarizeGithubCoordination
nodes.summary: Extracts and structures GitHub coordination summary data from work items, grouping epics, PRs, and issues with their statuses for inclusion in the status output.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point for the status CLI: opens the state store, fetches the status snapshot, optionally writes JSON and Markdown outputs to file, and prints the result.

nodes.name: parseArgs
nodes.summary: Parses CLI arguments for the status tool, extracting output format, file paths for JSON/Markdown writes, and section filter flags.

nodes.name: syncGithubWorkItems
nodes.summary: Fetches open GitHub PRs and issues via the gh CLI, upserts them into the state store as work items, and closes any stale items no longer present in GitHub.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point for the work-items CLI: dispatches to list, get, set, close, or GitHub sync subcommands against the state store.

nodes.name: buildGithubPrWorkItem
nodes.summary: Maps a GitHub PR API response object to the ECC work item format, computing status, owner, and metadata fields.

nodes.name: buildGithubIssueWorkItem
nodes.summary: Maps a GitHub issue API response object to the ECC work item format, including label extraction and metadata normalization.

nodes.name: closeStaleGithubItems
nodes.summary: Marks work items in the state store as closed if their IDs are no longer present in the set of active GitHub items for the given repo.

nodes.name: seedStore
nodes.summary: Seeds a fresh state store database with representative fixture data covering sessions, skill runs, skill versions, decisions, install state, and governance events for use in integration tests.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Main test runner that executes the full state store test suite: verifies database initialization, migration idempotency, session listing/detail, status aggregation, work item CRUD, and CLI script output.

nodes.name: createGhShim
nodes.summary: Creates a gh CLI shim binary for testing: writes a Node.js script that serves pre-configured JSON responses based on argument patterns, enabling hermetic GitHub API simulation.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Test runner for GitHub coordination sync scenarios: verifies that work-items.js correctly syncs PRs and issues from a gh shim into the state store and marks stale items as closed.
